name: the-new-economics
description: W. Edwards Deming's The New Economics — a revolutionary management framework based on the System of Profound Knowledge for transforming industry, government, and education.
useCase: Understanding systems thinking, managing variation, eliminating performance ratings, leading transformation, improving quality, fostering intrinsic motivation.
knownRisks: Deming's ideas challenge deeply held management assumptions — expect resistance
The statistical tools (control charts) require training to apply correctly
Transformation requires top-level commitment — cannot be done from the middle
